pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.2 to align with Java 11 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the Java compiler and runtime version property from 1.8 to 11.

Change the project packaging type from default jar to war.
Add the Bean Validation API dependency for input validation support.
Add Thymeleaf Layout Dialect for better template structure management.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add Spring Security starter to enable authentication and authorization features.
Add Thymeleaf Spring Security integration for secure template rendering.
Rename project name and description to reflect new branding or context.
